overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street toward Lizzie's Bar. The scene features intense neon lighting in magenta, cyan, and purple reflecting off wet pavement, with futuristic architecture and scattered NPCs populating the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk street with neon storefronts

events.description: slight left turn while navigating the street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street, passing by illuminated storefronts and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking past camera toward the left

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'Houston' mounted on building facade
futuristic curved high-rise building with horizontal lit windows
small booth structure with bright vertical advertisement screens
black metal fence structure with vertical bars

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cyberpunk street corridor at night, flanked by tall buildings with neon signage. The wet asphalt reflects the magenta and cyan lights from surrounding advertisements as the camera moves forward past parked vehicles and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of Lizzie's Bar with steam effects

events.description: exits narrow street into open plaza area with Lizzie's Bar visible ahead
steam and fog effects become visible near the ground surface

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the bar entrance, navigating around seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: person in purple tank top and orange pants sitting on concrete bench
person with blue hair standing and gesturing while talking on phone

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign with stylized text reading 'Lizzie's Bar'
massive horizontal billboard displaying 'nicola' text with anime character
clusters of black trash bags piled on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza with Lizzie's Bar dominating the far view, its massive cyan neon sign glowing against the night sky. Steam rises from the wet pavement as the camera moves through the space, passing NPCs loitering near benches and trash piles while the Nicola billboard looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach to bar entrance with neon decorations

events.description: large billboard structure temporarily blocks view of the bar entrance
slight course correction to align directly with the entrance doorway

agents.ego_description: moving through the plaza toward the entrance, passing crouching figures near the pathway

notable_agents.action: person crouching down near the entrance pathway, facing away from camera

entered.detail: large vertical neon signs in pink and cyan depicting stylized cat-woman figures flanking the entrance
metal roll-up door entrance with purple lighting above
vertical digital poster screens displaying advertisements on the building wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching the bar entrance through the plaza, with the iconic neon cat-woman silhouettes becoming prominent on either side of the door. The camera passes by digital advertisement screens and crouching NPCs while the entrance door grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance queue area under Lizzie's Bar awning

events.description: moves under the entrance overhang into the sheltered queue area
slows down and stops in front of the bouncer at the entrance door

agents.ego_description: approaching the bouncer standing guard at the entrance, preparing to enter the bar

notable_agents.action: bouncer with pink hair and white crop top holding a bat, standing guard at the door
person leaning against wall near the entrance, observing the area

entered.detail: red velvet rope on chrome stanchions marking the entrance queue line
purple-lit architectural overhang above the bar entrance door

segments.scene_description: Standing at the entrance to Lizzie's Bar under the purple-lit overhang, facing the bouncer who guards the metal door. The neon cat silhouettes frame the entrance on both sides as the camera comes to a stop at the velvet rope barrier, completing the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-lit plaza. It begins by moving through a narrow street flanked by towering buildings, where magenta and cyan advertisements reflect off the wet asphalt and parked vehicles. As the camera advances, the corridor expands into a wide plaza dominated by the massive glowing sign of Lizzie's Bar and a looming Nicola billboard, with steam rising from the pavement around loitering pedestrians. The scene then shifts toward the bar's entrance, passing digital screens and crouching NPCs as the iconic neon cat-woman silhouettes grow more prominent. Finally, the camera comes to a stop under a purple-lit overhang at the velvet rope barrier, facing the bouncer who guards the metal door.
